findings: Air preheater baskets heavily fouled withite ash deposits; combustion O2 at 6.5% (target 4%); excess air ratio high due to APH restriction
action_taken: Cleaned APH baskets (water wash + air blow); recalibrated O2 trim controller; adjusted FD fan damper curve; post-cleaning efficiency measured at 86.5%; recommended quarterly APH cleaning
parts_used: APH cleaning chemicals (25L Descalant-X); 2x O2 sensor elements
follow_up_required: Yes — follow-up efficiency test after 1 month of operation on new coal

findings: 4 SH tubes in Row 2 showing severe erosion (wall thinned from 5.6mm to 1.8mm at bends); erosion caused by 18% ash coal vs 12% design
action_taken: Plugged 2 most-damaged tubes as temporary measure; replaced 4 tubes during 3-day planned outage; installed erosion shields (SS410 overlay) on 12 vulnerable tube bends; performed UT survey on all SH tubes
parts_used: 4x SA213 T11 tubes (6m each); 12x erosion shields (SS410); welding consumables; NDE consumables
follow_up_required: Yes — UT survey after 3 months operation to verify erosion shield effectiveness

findings: TF heater operating normally; flue gas temp 185°C (design 180°C — acceptable); TF pump vibration 3.2 mm/s (good); TF quality test — flash point 186°C (acceptable but declining); expansion tank level normal
action_taken: Cleaned burner nozzles; checked and tightened all flange bolts; calibrated all temperature instruments; performed TF quality analysis; recommended 20% TF top-up with fresh fluid at next shutdown
parts_used: Burner nozzle cleaning kit; calibration gas (zero and span); TF sample bottles
follow_up_required: Yes — TF top-up during next planned shutdown (Apr-2026)

findings: Field 3 TR set — thyristor SCR-3 intermittent fault causing reduced sparking rate; rapping system on Fields 1-2 over-rapping (dislodging collected dust back into gas stream)
action_taken: Replaced faulty thyristor SCR-3; re-tuned rapping sequence — increased intervals from 5 min to 12 min for Fields 1-2; fine-tuned secondary voltage/current for each field; achieved 99.7% in re-test
parts_used: 1x Thyristor SCR-3 (ABB); 2x rapping motor brushes; instrument cables
follow_up_required: No — performance guarantee test passed; regular AMC to begin
